tagline: The discontinued camera repair and maintenance guide
hero_headline: Your vintage camera deserves a clear maintenance roadmap
hero_sub: Every discontinued camera model has a complete solution: replacement battery options, film recommendations, troubleshooting guides, and repair channels—all in one place
pains: Battery discontinued with no alternatives? Spend hours searching forums for vague answers that may not even work
Confused about film and exposure settings? Constantly digging through old threads, terrified of wasting a roll
Camera broken and can't find a reliable repair technician? Pricing is completely opaque and unpredictable

features.title: Battery replacement solutions
features.desc: Every camera model paired with compatible battery alternatives, adapters, and where to buy them

features.title: Film configuration guide
features.desc: Film stock recommendations and exposure compensation settings—easy enough for beginners

features.title: Troubleshooting database
features.desc: Common faults, self-repair difficulty ratings, and which technicians to contact if needed

features.title: Repair technician directory
features.desc: Trusted independent technicians nationwide, mail-in repair shops, and typical repair cost ranges

how.desc: Filter by brand, era, and mount type—find your model's complete guide in seconds
Batteries, film, common issues, repair options—no forum hunting required
Order batteries, select film, arrange repairs—we've included all the links

proof: Manually collecting and verifying repair data by camera model. Early users will directly shape development priorities
cta_sub: First users shape the feature roadmap directly—completely free

faq.a: Manually collected and verified from repair technicians, photography forums, and manufacturer documentation—updated by model

faq.q: How do I find my camera?
faq.a: Browse by brand, decade, and mount type, or search the model directly

faq.q: Are the repair technicians real people?
faq.a: All real independent technicians and small shops. Users contact them directly—we're just the information platform

seo_pages: [Camera model] battery replacement and adapter options
[Camera model] recommended film and exposure settings
disclaimer: Repair information provided for reference only. Consult a professional technician for complex repairs. Users assume all risk for self-repair
